content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 12:45 PDT] Create a new file `arms-race.html` - a CAPTCHA Genetic Arms Race simulator. This is a self-contained HTML page (no external dependencies) for the gif-captcha project.

## Concept
An evolutionary co-evolution simulation where bot populations and CAPTCHA defenses evolve against each other over generations, demonstrating the Red Queen effect in cybersecurity. Bots mutate to bypass CAPTCHAs, CAPTCHAs adapt to catch bots. Neither side can rest - they must keep evolving.

## Features

### 1. Simulation Engine
- **Bot Population**: Each bot has a genome encoding capabilities (OCR skill, timing mimicry, mouse naturalism, pattern recognition, fingerprint evasion) as float values 0-1
- **CAPTCHA Population**: Each CAPTCHA has a genome encoding defenses (visual complexity, timing analysis, behavioral checks, fingerprint depth, cognitive challenge) as float values 0-1
- **Fitness**: Bots score by beating CAPTCHAs (capability > defense threshold). CAPTCHAs score by catching bots while not frustrating humans (balance between security and usability).
- **Evolution**: Tournament selection, single-point crossover, gaussian mutation. Both populations evolve each generation.

### 2. Interactive Controls
- Play/Pause/Step buttons for simulation
- Speed slider (1x to 100x)
- Population size slider (10-100)
- Mutation rate slider (0.01-0.5)
- "Introduce Threat" button - inject a super-bot into the population
- "Deploy Patch" button - inject a super-CAPTCHA
- Generation counter display

### 3. Canvas Visualizations
- **Arms Race Chart** (top): Line chart showing average bot fitness vs average CAPTCHA fitness over generations (two colored lines). X-axis is generation, Y-axis is fitness. Should show the oscillating Red Queen dynamic.
- **Genome Heatmap** (middle-left): 2D heatmap grid showing current bot population genomes (rows = bots, columns = traits). Color intensity = trait value.
- **Defense Heatmap** (middle-right): Same for CAPTCHA population genomes.
- **Species Diversity** (bottom): Bar chart showing trait variance across the population (genetic diversity metric). Low diversity = extinction risk.

### 4. Event Log
- Scrolling log showing key events: "Gen 42: Bot mutation spike detected", "Gen 55: CAPTCHA defense converged on timing analysis", "Gen 67: Mass extinction event - 80% of bots eliminated"
- Auto-detect interesting events (convergence, diversity crashes, fitness crossovers, dominant strategies)

### 5. Proactive Insights Panel
- Sidebar showing autonomous analysis:
  - "Red Queen Index" - measure of co-evolutionary pressure
  - "Dominant Bot Strategy" - which trait is highest across population
  - "Weakest Defense" - which CAPTCHA trait is lagging
  - "Extinction Risk" - based on diversity metrics
  - "Arms Race Phase" - classify as escalation/stalemate/collapse
  - Proactive recommendations: "Bot OCR skills dominating - recommend deploying visual complexity patch"

### 6. Presets
- 4 scenario presets: "Balanced Start", "Bot Advantage", "Fortress CAPTCHA", "Diversity Crisis"
- Each sets initial population distributions differently

## Style
- Match the project's dark theme style. Use CSS variables:
  ```css
  --bg: #0a0a0a; --surface: #1a1a1a; --border: #2a2a2a;
  --text: #e0e0e0; --primary: #00d4aa; --danger: #ff4757; --warning: #ffa502;
  ```
- Bot color: #ff4757 (red), CAPTCHA color: #00d4aa (teal)
- Use Canvas API for all charts (no libraries)
- Responsive layout, works on desktop

## Structure
- Single self-contained HTML file with inline CSS and JS
- No external dependencies
- Use requestAnimationFrame for smooth animation
- All state in a single simulation object

## File to create: `arms-race.html`

After creating the file, verify it's valid HTML by checking the structure is complete (opening/closing tags balanced).
I’m creating a new self-contained `arms-race.html` for this workspace and I’ll first inspect the existing project files so the page fits the repo’s style and structure.

I’ve confirmed this repo already ships many single-file dark-theme dashboards. Next I’m sampling a few of the existing HTML pages and shared styles so `arms-race.html` matches the project’s established structure instead of inventing a new one.

I have enough context from the existing single-file dashboards. I’m now writing `arms-race.html` as a fully inline page with a single `simulation` state object, four canvas visualizations, an event log, preset-driven initialization, and a responsive sidebar for autonomous analysis.

output.stdout:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src https: data:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none';">
    <meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
    <title>GIF CAPTCHA — AI Response Simulator</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="shared.css">
    <style>
        /* simulator.html — page-specific styles (base styles in shared.css) */
        .container { max-width: 1000px; }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            margin: 2.5rem 0 1rem;
            color: var(--accent);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        h2:first-child { margin-top: 0; }

        /* Model selector */
        .model-selector {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .model-btn {
            padding: 0.7rem 1.2rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
            border: 2px solid var(--border);
            background: var(--surface);
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-family: inherit;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.2rem;
            min-width: 120px;
        }
        .model-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--text); background: var(--surface-hover); }
        .model-btn.active { border-color: var(--accent); background: rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.1); color: var(--text); }
        .model-btn .model-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; }
        .model-btn .model-year { font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.7; }
        .model-btn .model-score {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-top: 0.15rem;
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }

        /* Overview cards */
        .overview-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }
        .overview-card {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 1.2rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .overview-card .card-value {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }
        .overview-card .card-label {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            margin-top: 0.3rem;
        }

        /* Response cards */
        .response-card {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            transition: border-color 0.2s;
        }
        .response-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
        .response-card .card-header {
            padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .response-card .card-header .title-group {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
            flex: 1;
        }
        .response-card .gif-number {
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            color: #fff;
        }
        .response-card .gif-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }
        .response-card .result-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.7rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .result-pass { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
        .result-fail { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red); }
        .result-partial { background: var(--yellow-bg); color: var(--yellow); }
        .expand-icon {
            color: var(--muted);
            transition: transform 0.2s;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
        }
        .response-card.expanded .expand-icon { transform: rotate(180deg); }
        .response-card .card-body {
            display: none;
            padding: 0 1.25rem 1.25rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .response-card.expanded .card-body { display: block; }

        /* Response comparison */
        .response-comparison {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 1rem;
            margin: 1rem 0;
        }
        .response-box {
            background: var(--bg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 1rem;
        }
        .response-box .response-label {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .response-box .response-text {
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            line-height: 1.5;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        /* Capability bars */
        .capability-section { margin-top: 1rem; }
        .capability-section h4 {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--accent);
            margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
        }
        .capability-bar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-label {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            width: 140px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-bar-bg {
            flex: 1;
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-bar-fill {
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: width 0.5s ease;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-value {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            width: 28px;
            text-align: right;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Reasoning box */
        .reasoning-box {
            background: var(--bg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-left: 3px solid var(--purple);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
            margin-top: 0.8rem;
        }
        .reasoning-box .reasoning-title {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: var(--purple);
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }
        .reasoning-box .reasoning-text {
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        /* Scorecard chart */
        .chart-container {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .chart-container h3 {
            font-size: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }
        .chart-container .chart-subtitle {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        canvas { display: block; width: 100%; }

        /* two-col, insight-box — see shared.css */

        /* Heatmap table */

            font-weight: 700;
            width: 28px;
            text-align: right;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Reasoning box */
        .reasoning-box {
            background: var(--bg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-left: 3px solid var(--purple);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
            margin-top: 0.8rem;
        }
        .reasoning-box .reasoning-title {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: var(--purple);
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }
        .reasoning-box .reasoning-text {
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        /* Scorecard chart */
        .chart-container {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .chart-container h3 {
            font-size: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }
        .chart-container .chart-subtitle {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        canvas { display: block; width: 100%; }

        /* two-col, insight-box — see shared.css */

        /* Heatmap table */
output.formatted_output:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy" content="default-src 'none'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src https: data:; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'none';">
    <meta name="referrer" content="no-referrer">
    <title>GIF CAPTCHA — AI Response Simulator</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="shared.css">
    <style>
        /* simulator.html — page-specific styles (base styles in shared.css) */
        .container { max-width: 1000px; }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.4rem;
            margin: 2.5rem 0 1rem;
            color: var(--accent);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        h2:first-child { margin-top: 0; }

        /* Model selector */
        .model-selector {
            display: flex;
            gap: 0.75rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
            flex-wrap: wrap;
        }
        .model-btn {
            padding: 0.7rem 1.2rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
            border: 2px solid var(--border);
            background: var(--surface);
            color: var(--muted);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-family: inherit;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.2rem;
            min-width: 120px;
        }
        .model-btn:hover { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--text); background: var(--surface-hover); }
        .model-btn.active { border-color: var(--accent); background: rgba(88, 166, 255, 0.1); color: var(--text); }
        .model-btn .model-name { font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.95rem; }
        .model-btn .model-year { font-size: 0.7rem; opacity: 0.7; }
        .model-btn .model-score {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-top: 0.15rem;
            padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
            border-radius: 10px;
        }

        /* Overview cards */
        .overview-grid {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 2rem;
        }
        .overview-card {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 10px;
            padding: 1.2rem;
            text-align: center;
        }
        .overview-card .card-value {
            font-size: 1.8rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }
        .overview-card .card-label {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            margin-top: 0.3rem;
        }

        /* Response cards */
        .response-card {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
            transition: border-color 0.2s;
        }
        .response-card:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
        .response-card .card-header {
            padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            user-select: none;
        }
        .response-card .card-header .title-group {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.6rem;
            flex: 1;
        }
        .response-card .gif-number {
            width: 30px;
            height: 30px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            flex-shrink: 0;
            color: #fff;
        }
        .response-card .gif-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
        }
        .response-card .result-badge {
            display: inline-block;
            padding: 0.2rem 0.7rem;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .result-pass { background: var(--green-bg); color: var(--green); }
        .result-fail { background: var(--red-bg); color: var(--red); }
        .result-partial { background: var(--yellow-bg); color: var(--yellow); }
        .expand-icon {
            color: var(--muted);
            transition: transform 0.2s;
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            margin-left: 0.5rem;
        }
        .response-card.expanded .expand-icon { transform: rotate(180deg); }
        .response-card .card-body {
            display: none;
            padding: 0 1.25rem 1.25rem;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .response-card.expanded .card-body { display: block; }

        /* Response comparison */
        .response-comparison {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
            gap: 1rem;
            margin: 1rem 0;
        }
        .response-box {
            background: var(--bg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 8px;
            padding: 1rem;
        }
        .response-box .response-label {
            font-size: 0.72rem;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.05em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        .response-box .response-text {
            font-size: 0.88rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            line-height: 1.5;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        /* Capability bars */
        .capability-section { margin-top: 1rem; }
        .capability-section h4 {
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            color: var(--accent);
            margin-bottom: 0.6rem;
        }
        .capability-bar {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-label {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            width: 140px;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-bar-bg {
            flex: 1;
            height: 8px;
            background: var(--border);
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-bar-fill {
            height: 100%;
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: width 0.5s ease;
        }
        .capability-bar .cap-value {
            font-size: 0.75rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            width: 28px;
            text-align: right;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }

        /* Reasoning box */
        .reasoning-box {
            background: var(--bg);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-left: 3px solid var(--purple);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            padding: 0.8rem 1rem;
            margin-top: 0.8rem;
        }
        .reasoning-box .reasoning-title {
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            color: var(--purple);
            font-weight: 700;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }
        .reasoning-box .reasoning-text {
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            line-height: 1.5;
        }

        /* Scorecard chart */
        .chart-container {
            background: var(--surface);
            border: 1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
        }
        .chart-container h3 {
            font-size: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
        }
        .chart-container .chart-subtitle {
            font-size: 0.8rem;
            color: var(--muted);
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }
        canvas { display: block; width: 100%; }

        /* two-col, insight-box — see shared.css */

        /* Heatmap table */
